review.reference: WP01 approved: TranslatableInterface expanded with 9 methods, trait + exception + ContentEntityBase wired. All gates green. EntityTypeManager registry on base is a sensible addition. TranslationController collateral fix verified.

reason: WP01 approved: TranslatableInterface expanded with 9 methods, trait + exception + ContentEntityBase wired. All gates green. EntityTypeManager registry on base is a sensible addition. TranslationController collateral fix verified.
Boot validation for translatable types ready — all gates green

review.reference: WP02 approved: 3 new InvalidEntityTypeException factories + boot validation in EntityType::__construct (langcode/default_langcode/TranslatableInterface) + FR-005 bundle independence comment + 10 passing unit tests. Scope expansion to ContentEntityKeys and EntityMetadataReader (default_langcode plumbing) is defensible (required for attribute-path end-to-end validation), safe (strictly additive, nullable default), and correct (matches spec intent). Gates: phpunit entity Unit GREEN (434/434), bin/check-package-layers GREEN, phpstan entity package errors DECREASED from 454 (base) to 418 (lane) — net -36 errors; 3 new minor errors in test file's anonymous class signature (cosmetic). cs-check has 1 trailing-newline issue in TranslatableInterface.php (WP01-owned, out of WP02 scope).

review.reference: WP03 approved: FieldDefinition::translatable() builder + boot validation; SYSTEM_KEYS const; caught BenchmarkFixture regression. All gates green.

reason: WP03 approved: FieldDefinition::translatable() builder + boot validation; SYSTEM_KEYS const; caught BenchmarkFixture regression. All gates green.
sql-blob translation: PK widening, default_langcode column, per-langcode _data, non-translatable fallback, UUID partial unique index

review.reference: WP04 approved: sql-blob translation storage. PK widened to (entity_id, langcode) for translatable types via isSqlBlobTranslatable() guard; default_langcode VARCHAR(12) NOT NULL column emitted on every row; partial UNIQUE INDEX <table>_uuid_default WHERE langcode=default_langcode for SQLite/PostgreSQL with documented non-unique fallback + operator warning for MySQL/MariaDB. SqlEntityStorage.saveTranslatable() splits translatable vs non-translatable fields and routes to correct rows (FR-021/FR-024); loadTranslatable() picks default-langcode row as canonical and feeds langcode->fields map to _setTranslationData(). Pending translation deletions drained inside same UnitOfWork transaction. All 7 SqlBlobTranslatableTest cases pass. Full Unit suite: 43 errors (down from 55 at WP03 baseline) — WP04 introduced ZERO new failures and actually fixes 12 prior failures while adding 7 new passing tests. phpstan clean. KNOWN LIMITATIONS: (1) allocateTranslatableEntityId() uses SELECT MAX(id)+1; under concurrent writers a race yields an explicit PK-collision error (transient failure) rather than corruption — not retry-resilient but not data-corrupting; track for hardening post-v1. (2) MySQL/MariaDB UUID uniqueness across default-langcode rows is application-enforced only — operator warning emitted. KNOWN BACKLOG: 43 pre-existing failures from WP01/WP02 default_langcode plumbing fallout in api/cli/taxonomy/path packages — flagged for WP14 cleanup.

sql-column translation: __translation sibling table, partition by translatability, LEFT JOIN hydrator, write dispatch, multi-cardinality shapes

review.reference: WP05 approved: sql-column translation storage delivered per FR-026..FR-032. TranslationSchemaHandler emits sibling <table>__translation with (entity_id, langcode) PK and CASCADE FK to primary; multi-cardinality tables get (entity_id, delta) for non-translatable and (entity_id, langcode, delta) with composite FK to __translation for translatable (FR-032). SqlColumnTranslationHydrator issues single LEFT JOIN ordered by CASE so default-langcode hydrates first (FR-028). saveSqlColumnTranslatable wraps INSERT path in transaction: atomic primary + default-langcode (+ optional active-langcode) translation rows (FR-029). UPDATE path dispatches by translatability - translatable cols write to translation row, non-translatable to primary (FR-030); removeTranslation deletes only the (entity_id, langcode) row (FR-031). SqlSchemaHandler broadened default_langcode emission from sql-blob-only to all translatable types - single-write, no double-emit risk. Scope expansion into SqlEntityStorage.php and SqlSchemaHandler.php matches T024/T021. Gates: phpstan clean, cs-check clean, package-layers OK, 468 entity-storage tests pass, 12 new SqlColumnTranslatableTest tests pass. Full-suite delta: WP04 baseline 7780 tests / 46 errors / 1 failure; WP05 HEAD 7792 tests (+12 new, all passing) / 46 errors / 1 failure - IDENTICAL pre-existing baseline preserved, no new failures introduced (implementer reported 43->46 was a misread; actual baseline was already 46).

review.reference: WP06 approved: FallbackChainResolver (NFR-002 bounded, lazy generator), withDefaultChain factory as T029 substitute (no EntityServiceProvider in entity package — defensible), trait fallback wiring with fieldLangcode cache and repeat-read short-circuit, NFR-001 non-translatable invariant preserved. 15 new tests pass. Gates green; full suite 46e/1f matches baseline.
